title: The Press and Registration of Periodicals Act, 2023
full_text: The Press and Registration of Periodicals Act, 2023 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 202351 Act Number: 51 Enactment Date: 2023-12-28 Act Year: 2023 Short Title: The Press and Registration of Periodicals Act, 2023 Long Title: An Act to provide for press, registration of periodicals and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto Ministry: Ministry of Information and Broadcasting Enforcement Date: 1-03-2024 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Press and Registration of Periodicals Act, 2023 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II PRINTING PRESS AND PERIODICAL CHAPTER IIl AUTHORITIES CHAPTER IV REGISTRATION OF PERIODICAL CHAPTER V PENALTIES CHAPTER VI APPEAL CHAPTER VII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Printer to furnish intimation. Section 4. Publication of periodical. Section 5. Press Registrar General and other officers. Section 6. Powers of Press Registrar General. Section 7. Registration of periodical. Section 8. Revision of certificate of registration or title. Section 9. Transfer of ownership of a periodical. Section 10. Discontinuation of a periodical. Section 11. Suspension or cancellation of registration. Section 12. Annual statement to be furnished by periodical. Section 13. Annual report. Section 14. Power of Press Registrar General to impose penalty. Section 15. Press and Registration Appellate Board. Section 16. Power of Central Government to issue directions. Section 17. Press Registrar General and other officers to be public servants. Section 18. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 19. Power of Central Government to make rule. Section 20. Power to remove difficulties. Section 21. Laying of rules and notification. Section 22. Repeal and savings.
